body: Bhai groww app mera paisa kha rh h, pehle apne App p balance mangta h then investment krta h stocks me. I had some Rs. grow balance...kuch din baad khud he show krne lga ki mere bank account me send kr diya...but 15 june ho aj tk mera paisa ni Mila.... complaint krne p bolte h humne to send kr diya.Mei toh apni sari investment he close kru ab..Darr lg rha h, isse acha toh Bank FD he h, atleast aise chori ni krte. Scam Hai Groww. I had high hopes, dreams to do my own investment, u r harassing me

author: [NAME]
body: The app is really made simple and easy Kudos to that Groww team, but the major issue that I face is from Groww Search. When I search for MFs it always shows me very less funds and if I want to search for specific fund I have to type full name of it. Where as on other apps like Coin, if i type some terms all MFs having that term in the title come up in the results. It will be very helpful for users if Groww solves this problem.

author: [NAME]
body: ये एप्प इतनी बढ़िया नहीं है। जब कोई समस्या आती है तो ये कस्टमर को कोई संतोषजनक जबाब नहीं देते। न खुद की कोई जबाबदेही समझते। टेक्निकल प्रॉब्लम की वजह से आपको अगर लॉस हो गया तो ये उसकी भरपाई नहीं करेंगे दूसरा अगर टेक्निकल इशू के कारण आपको प्रॉफिट हो गया तो वो ये लोग वापिस ले लेंगे। बहुत बार ऐसा हुआ है बग्स बहुत आते है इस प्लेटफार्म में। आगे और भी बहुत से इश्यूज है वो फिर कभी साझा करूंगा
